name: sloth-skill-tree

plugins.name: maycrest-command
plugins.description: Maycrest Command — Sloth Command strategic orchestrator with task decomposition, parallel execution, CI/PR integration, and reaction protocols. Sloth Dispatch fast router with event-driven triage. Plus agent registry, voice personas, brand tokens, and session hooks.
